title: PixelCart

buildability.reason: A 3‑person team can build a Shopify app extension that uploads an image, calls GPT‑4o Vision, parses attributes, and queries the Storefront API within 3 days, with 3‑week refinement and 10‑week launch.

speedToRevenue.reason: The app can be self‑serve via the Shopify App Store and billed monthly, but first‑cycle revenue depends on merchant adoption of a niche image‑to‑product feature.

wedge.reason: Merchants instantly turn lifestyle images into structured product queries in under 2 seconds, boosting conversion.

distribution.reason: Targeting $100K–$1M fashion/home brands is reachable through the Shopify App Store and content marketing, covering the $50K–$2M DTC TAM.

trapRisk.reason: The thesis avoids generative 3D/AR, real‑time voice/video, autonomous repricing, and multi‑app scope, presenting a low‑risk, small‑team‑friendly solution.

expansion.reason: Adding more categories, languages, and premium analytics can scale the product from €10K to €1M without pivoting.

technicalSnapshot: PixelCart is a Shopify App Store extension built with App Bridge and a Shopify Admin API backend. It uses the Storefront API to query product catalogs and the GPT‑4o Vision API to extract structured attributes from uploaded lifestyle images. The app provides a lightweight UI component that merchants embed on product pages, enabling instant image‑to‑product search and cart integration.

v1Plan.day3: Deploy a minimal Shopify app skeleton with image upload UI, GPT‑4o Vision call, and attribute display.
v1Plan.week3: Integrate Storefront API queries to match extracted attributes to catalog items, display results, and allow adding to cart.
v1Plan.week10: Add analytics, billing, performance optimizations, and submit the app to the Shopify App Store for public release.
